......
class User {
}
class Prototype {
+ create_clone()
}
class ConcretePrototype {
+ create_clone()
}
User --> Prototype : Use
Prototype <|-- ConcretePrototype
note right of User
<<C>>
end note
note right of Prototype
<<I>>
end note
note right of ConcretePrototype
<<C>>
end note
@enduml
